sections.title: Trying to sober up Skippy without a bucket of water

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: You know, I could shock him out of it if I could find some cold water...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Are you all right? You seem a little...incoherent.

lines.speaker: Skippy
lines.text: Inc'hearnt? Inc'herant! You...you...with yer fancy book- lernin' words. You'd be more than inc'herant if youd seen...

lines.speaker: Skippy
lines.text: (Dramatic pause)

lines.speaker: Skippy
lines.text: THEM!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm sure I would as well.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm going over here to talk to non-crazy people now.

lines.speaker: Skippy
lines.text: Yeah? Yeah? Well when THEY come floppin' into your house and eat your furniture you'll be sorry!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Who are

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: (Dramatic pause)

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: THEY?

lines.speaker: Skippy
lines.text: They! Those bloodthirsty, flesh-tearing devils! They are the reason I'm out here every day hurlin' bottles into the sea!

lines.speaker: Skippy
lines.text: They are the reason I've lost everything, except the horrifying memory of what THEY look like...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: And what do THEY look like?

lines.speaker: Skippy
lines.text: Mudskippers!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Mudskippers?

lines.speaker: Skippy
lines.text: Aye, Mudskippers! Those ferocious, ravening, evil, beady-eyed terrors of the deep!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I...see...

lines.speaker: Skippy
lines.text: I was ambushed by them way back, see. They got the drop on me...I can't remember where, somewhere around here though.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: These would be the mudskippers, right?

lines.speaker: Skippy
lines.text: Aye! The mudskippers! Huge they were! Ten feet of glistening, muddy flesh floppin' towards me with white foam flying from their gnashing fangs!

lines.speaker: Skippy
lines.text: I fought them up and down the beach, with the tide rising and more of them leaping towards me with cutlasses drawn!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: This is fascinating, but I have to be...

lines.speaker: Skippy
lines.text: Shut yer' word-hole and listen! I can't remember all the details, as I'm sure they must have hit me quite hard, but the last thing I remember before it all went black...

lines.speaker: Skippy
lines.text: ...was one of those devils rearing over me, its eyes glowin' red with the fires of hell!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Fires of hell...right. I believe you.

lines.speaker: Skippy
lines.text: No you don't! You think I'm crazy, like all the rest! Well, if I'm crazy, how did I get these?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Get what?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Giant mudskipper bites! Where did you get those?

lines.speaker: Skippy
lines.text: I can't remember... I've been drinking to forget the horror, and all I seem to have forgotten is where it all happened...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hmmm...I suppose if I sober you up you may well start to recall.

lines.speaker: Skippy
lines.text: You'll have a job. I've been drinking this for a week.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: 'Captain Braindeath's Extra Strength Rum/Drain Cleaner. Now 50% more debilitating'?

lines.speaker: Skippy
lines.text: It's the extra sheep tranquilizers that gives it that added kick!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Stay here and I'll be right back. Try not to move. Or go near any open flames.

sections.title: When using the right-click Sober-Up option after Skippy and the Mogres

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I think he's sober enough. And I don't want to use another bucket of water.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hey, Skippy.

lines.speaker: Skippy
lines.text: Hey you!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: How do I annoy the Mogres again?

lines.speaker: Skippy
lines.text: Go south to Mudskipper Point and lob a Fishing Explosive into the sea. You can grab them from the Slayer masters.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thanks! So, what are you going to do now?

lines.speaker: Skippy
lines.text: Well, I was planning on continuing my hobby of wandering up and down this bit of coastline, bellowing random threats and throwing bottles.

lines.speaker: Skippy
lines.text: And you?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I was planning on wandering up and down the landscape, bugging people to see if they had mindblowingly dangerous quests for me to undertake.

lines.speaker: Skippy
lines.text: Well, good luck with that!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: You too!

lines.speaker: Skippy
lines.text: Weirdo...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Loony...

sections.title: When using a Forlorn boot on Skippy

lines.speaker: Skippy
lines.text: Thanks! Now I have two right boots!

lines.speaker: Skippy
lines.text: Do you wanna skip the Tutorial?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Send me to the mainland now.

lines.speaker: Skippy
lines.text: Right on. I'll read you the official messages first, then send you on your way. Ahem...

lines.speaker: Skippy
lines.text: I am now going to teleport you to Kourend Castle where your journey in the Twisted League will begin. Once you arrive, the Leagues Tutor will fill you in on how the Twisted League works. Good luck!

lines.speaker: Skippy
lines.text: Prepare yourself!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Who are you?

lines.speaker: Skippy
lines.text: My name's Skippy. Normally I live down by Rimmington.

lines.speaker: Skippy
lines.text: Although I guess you won't be able to get to Rimmington on this League world...

lines.speaker: Skippy
lines.text: Just lately the Council wants to let people skip the Tutorial, so - ha ha ha - they dump the job on Skippy. Bah!

lines.speaker: Skippy
lines.text: So, anyway, do you want to skip the Tutorial?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can I decide later?

lines.speaker: Skippy
lines.text: Sure. You'll find me all over this island. Ask me again any time you like.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'll stay here for the Tutorial.

lines.speaker: Skippy
lines.text: Good choice. Let me know if you change your mind.

sections.title: During a seasonal or permanent Deadman Mode

lines.speaker: Skippy
lines.text: Do you wanna skip the Tutorial?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Send me to the mainland now.

lines.speaker: Skippy
lines.text: Right on. I'll read you the official messages first, then send you on your way. Ahem...

lines.speaker: Skippy
lines.text: When you arrive on the mainland you will be a Deadman. If you die when skulled, or if you are killed by another Deadman you will lose the most valuable items from your bank.

lines.speaker: Skippy
lines.text: To help you get started, you'll have 12 hours of immunity before anyone can attack you. Speak to the Doomsayer in Lumbridge to waive your immunity and get on with the killing!

lines.speaker: Skippy
lines.text: For more information, speak to Nigel in the Lumbridge graveyard. You may choose where to begin - where would you like to start?

lines.speaker: Skippy
lines.text: Prepare yourself!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Who are you?

lines.speaker: Skippy
lines.text: My name's Skippy. Normally I live down by Rimmington. You should come and see me when you're passing.

lines.speaker: Skippy
lines.text: Just lately the Council wants to let people skip the Tutorial, so - ha ha ha - they dump the job on Skippy. Bah!

lines.speaker: Skippy
lines.text: So, anyway, do you want to skip the Tutorial?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can I decide later?

lines.speaker: Skippy
lines.text: Sure. You'll find me all over this island. Ask me again any time you like.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'll stay here for the Tutorial.

lines.speaker: Skippy
lines.text: Good choice. Let me know if you change your mind.
